start: ^SSC Personel: The Supreme Student Council is the highest governing, law-making, and implementing body of the student government.
continue_1: ^SSC Personel: It represents student governments from different colleges when dealing with the university administration, the government, and other institutions.
continue_2: ^SSC Personel: The council also has the authority to conduct a general student assembly once every school year.
continue_3: ^SSC Personel: We also create programs and activities aimed at improving student welfare and campus life.
continue_4: ^You: A government of students, for the students, and by the students. Interesting.
continue_6: ^SSC Personel: Make sure to participate in the events we organize, student.
